properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Christ our redeemer died on the cross, Died for the sinner, paid all His due; Sprinkle your soul with the blood of the Lamb, And I will pass, will pass over you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I see the Blood, When I see the Blood, When I see the Blood, And I will pass, will pass over you.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: Judgment is coming, all will be there, Each one receiving justly his due; Hide in the saving, sin-cleansing blood, And I will pass, will pass over you.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, great compassion! O boundless love! O loving kindness, faithful and true! Find peace and shelter under the blood, And I will pass, will pass over you.
